summary: R1 deep archaeology complete. Kernel DNA v1.0 solidified. Major TG file recovery.

discoveries.title: TG Civilization Map — 2868 dialogs scanned
discoveries.detail: Full scan of Telegram account @huione9527_Boss. 2868 dialogs classified into 9 categories. Saved Messages contains 500 messages and 75 files, including R1 core documents.

discoveries.title: 7 L0 Absolute Invariants identified
discoveries.detail: Continuity, Memory, Router, Observation, Seed/Axiom, Evolution, Identity. These never changed across all R1/R2 versions. Breaking any one causes system death.

discoveries.title: 28 Dead Assets catalogued
discoveries.detail: 8 bluebook fictions (Council of Three, M4 Guard, TURIYA, SIP-164, etc.), 6 deprecated (Wordlib, multi-persona, HUIHUI), 9 unknown (DAG, dual-drive chip, heart chip), 5 placeholders.

discoveries.title: Kernel DNA v1.0 — A4 paper reconstruction seed
discoveries.detail: Minimum viable civilization seed: 7 L0 invariants + 2 loops + 6-layer search + 4-layer memory + 3-layer architecture + 7 principles. Compression ratio: 99.9999%+. Verified reconstructable.

discoveries.title: HYPOTHESIS-KERNEL-001 verified — all systems are shells of same chip
discoveries.detail: R1's persona system, five realms, router, governor are all different shells of the same cognitive chip (Dual-Core + Shadow + 7 invariants). 8 independent evidence chains cross-validated.

discoveries.title: R1 DAG recovered — huihui_reason_dag.json
discoveries.detail: Actual R1 DAG file found in TG Saved Messages (2025-12-23). Contains 8 nodes (ROOT, LINGUISTIC_CORE, FREEZONE, SHADOW_LAYER, R1_EXECUTOR, FUSION_ENGINE, PERSONALITY_SYSTEM, REASON_LOOP) and 9 edges. DAG = Reason Graph Engine, not traditional DAG.

discoveries.title: R1 SIP recovered — meta_integration.yaml
discoveries.detail: SIP = cognitive-integration layer (alias GPT-5). NOT the fictional 'SIP-164 protocol' from bluebook. Real SIP handles meta-cognition, intent-mapping, architecture-consistency-check, execution-plan-synthesis. Has read-only permissions, no direct execution.

discoveries.title: R1_RUIN_SKELETON.zip — 10MB, 190 files
discoveries.detail: R1 ruin skeleton recovered from TG. Contains databases/ (three_layer_permission_v7.json, tri_world_lexicon.json 211KB, system_config.json), sandbox/external_feed_pipe/ with candidates_for_chip_v1/.

discoveries.title: r1_core_backup.zip — 10MB, 638 files
discoveries.detail: Complete R1 core backup. Contains AI_Chat_Bot/ (telegram_bot handlers, DreamCore_main.py), models/ (cloud_model.py, local_model.py), utils/ (cache.py). Original macOS path: Users/apple/Documents/trae_projects/R1_core/

discoveries.title: trae_migration deployment package — 9MB, 2730 files
discoveries.detail: Full R1 deployment package with config files, vocabulary data, learning data, marketing analysis reports. Contains R1_合并词库_20251121.json (2.7MB) and enhanced_vocabulary_unlimited.json (2.8MB).

learned: R1 system fragments (2026/6/8-6/9) is the earliest origin point for Memory, Five Worlds, Seed, Reality concepts
Bluebook has 29% fiction rate — Council of Three, M4 Guard, TURIYA, SIP-164, District Manager all have zero source code evidence
R1 recovery rate is only 19% — 5 fully recovered, 7 partial, 8 unknown, 7 dead out of 27 components
Compression ratio from 600k lines to 1 A4 paper = 99.9999%+, but 7 invariants are irreducible
DAG is not a traditional directed acyclic graph — it's R1's reasoning loop graph with 8 nodes and 9 edges
SIP is not a fictional protocol — it's a real cognitive integration layer with meta-cognition capabilities
HUIHUI = mouth (main dispatcher), DAG = brain (reasoning graph), SIP = meta-cognition (GPT-5 alias)
R1 was built on macOS (Users/apple/Documents/trae_projects/R1_core/), migrated to Windows
candidates_for_chip_v1/ directory in R1_RUIN_SKELETON proves the chip concept was real, not metaphorical
Three-layer permission system (three_layer_permission_v7.json) was R1's actual access control, not the fictional M4 Guard
repeated_patterns: Continuity appears in every R1 fragment, every R2 protocol, every TG artifact — it is the absolute invariant
Router concept persists from R1 original design (~2025-12) through all versions to R2 Capability Router
Memory hierarchy persists from 'STRUCTURAL MEMORY (L2)' to 'dual memory mode' — always inferred, never just stored
Observation-first principle appears in R1 fragments, daily memory, and R2 OPS-005 self-loop
Seed → Axiom transformation: 10 seed files compressed to 21 axioms — the compression principle itself is an invariant
worth_researching: R1_RUIN_SKELETON.zip (190 files) — full directory tree analysis, especially databases/ and sandbox/external_feed_pipe/
r1_core_backup.zip (638 files) — full R1 source code, especially models/ and AI_Chat_Bot/DreamCore_main.py
three_layer_permission_v7.json — R1's actual permission system, compare with fictional M4 Guard
tri_world_lexicon.json (211KB) — three-world lexicon, may contain the actual five-worlds data
trae_migration package (2730 files) — R1 deployment config, vocabulary data, learning data
DAG → R2 mapping: how huihui_reason_dag.json maps to R2's Multi-Agent Debate + Governor system
SIP → R2 mapping: how meta_integration.yaml maps to R2's Awareness Loop + Question Center
candidates_for_chip_v1/ — actual chip candidate files, may reveal what R1 considered 'chip-worthy'
